name: Dallas (United States)

colors.symbolism: the dividing fimbriation and the central five-pointed star

description: A flag horizontally divided into red over blue, separated by a narrow white stripe, with a large white five-pointed star centred over the dividing line.
history: Dallas's municipal flag uses red, white and blue bands with the Texas Lone Star at the centre.

features.symbolism: Red over blue, separated by a narrow white fimbriation; the colours echo those of the United States and Texas flags.
The Lone Star of Texas, marking Dallas as a Texan city.
